title: Dyed / Colored Wolf Armor
description: Dye the new 1.20 wolf armor in over 5 million different colors!
body:
Dye the new 1.20 wolf armor in over 5 million different colors!
(Images on modrinth use old wolf armor texture, the mod works with the most recent one)
![cute wolfs in armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NVN2YvkY/images/654c55e7796e1e1d44654959dfb9105202865ced.png)

## Crafting 
When you initially craft wolf armor out of Armadillo Scutes it will be the vanilla wolf armor. 
To dye the armor, simply put it in a crafting table with some dyes. There are over 5 million different combinations! To remove the armor's color, wash it in a cauldron.
![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NVN2YvkY/images/316f50a8a8fb7f112c3fca96bbb683a7ee01e4e1.png)

## Customization
The dyed wolf armor deliberately follows a similar design and color pallet as the vanilla armor to keep up the same atmosphere. If you want brighter, splashier colors or a different texture simply modify the wolf armor texture using a texture pack.

You can safely use the mod in an existing world, because the default armor is still the vanilla one. 

Works both in single and in multiplayer.

Enjoy! :D
